name: memorydetective-plugin
description: iOS leak hunting and performance investigation. Bundles the memorydetective MCP server with a /perf-investigate skill — one-command install for Claude Code.

plugins.name: memorydetective
plugins.description: iOS leak hunting + performance investigation: 28 MCP tools, 34-pattern cycle classifier with Swift fixTemplate snippets, compareTracesByPattern for CI gating, /perf-investigate skill. Reads .memgraph + .trace files; classifies retain cycles; bridges to Swift source via SourceKit-LSP.
